hooks.command: python3 -c "import sys, json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); fp=d.get('file_path',''); blocked='api/generated/' in fp; print('BLOCK: Files under api/generated/ are auto-generated by Orval and must not be edited manually. Run npm run api:sync instead.') if blocked else None; sys.exit(2 if blocked else 0)"

python3 -c "import sys, json, re; d=json.load(sys.stdin); fp=d.get('file_path',''); m=re.search(r'Features/([^_][^/]+)/(.*Service|.*Controller|.*Validator|.*Repository)\.cs$', fp); print('Reminder: You edited a backend feature file in ' + m.group(1) + '. If behavior changed, update the feature spec via the spec-sync agent.') if m else None; sys.exit(0)"
